title: Lodestone Update Backport
description: Backports the new lodestone recipe and features from 1.21.5: Cheaper recipe, new ruined portal loot table, and tweaked advancements.
body:
This project backports the lodestone tweaks from version 1.21.5:
- **Cheaper Recipe**: Crafting with an iron ingot instead of a netherite ingot.
- **Ruined Portal Loot**: Ruined portal chests may now contain a lodestone or two.
- **Updated advancement**: "Country Lode, Take Me Home" now resides in the adventure section.
- **Updated Recipe Unlock**: The recipe is now unlocked when you obtain iron, not netherite.
